name: MoneyGram
description_short: West Milwaukee's MoneyGram at 4140 W Greenfield Ave handles check-cashing and money transfers, open Monday-Saturday 8AM-8PM.
description_long:
Located at 4140 W Greenfield Ave in West Milwaukee, WI, this standalone MoneyGram location provides check-cashing and financial services. The store maintains convenient hours: Monday through Saturday from 8 AM to 8 PM, and Sunday from 10 AM to 6 PM. West Milwaukee residents appreciate the extended weekday hours for quick financial transactions.

At this West Milwaukee MoneyGram branch, you can cash checks, send domestic and international money transfers, and pay bills. The experienced staff can assist with MoneyGram's money transfer network to virtually any location worldwide. Call +1 414-978-2004 to confirm current services and ask about fees before your visit.

When visiting the MoneyGram location in West Milwaukee, bring a valid government-issued photo ID and the check or payment information you need processed. The convenient 8 AM opening on weekdays helps professionals stop by before work, while Saturday hours accommodate weekend shoppers in the area. MoneyGram provides reliable financial services for individuals sending money to family or friends nationally and internationally.
address: 4140 W Greenfield Ave, West Milwaukee, WI 53215

company_info.headquarters: 4140 W Greenfield Ave, West Milwaukee, WI 53215

pros: Extended operating hours: 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM daily, including weekends, accommodates working individuals and those outside traditional banking hours
Hybrid online and offline access: Customers can manage transfers both remotely through online platforms and in-person at the physical location
Seven-day-a-week availability: Unlike many traditional financial institutions, this location operates every day of the week
Agent-based network model: Partnership with Realmex Corp provides neighborhood accessibility without requiring standalone branded locations
Multiple service types available: Check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and money sending/receiving consolidated at one location
Legal ID requirement enforced: Compliant verification process protects against fraud and financial crimes
cons: Fees not transparently displayed on location page: Customers must contact the location or visit moneygram.com to understand transaction costs
Agent location dependent: Service quality and availability depend on the partner business (Realmex Corp) operating independently
Limited information about specific services: The website provides minimal detail about what services this particular location offers beyond general money transfer capabilities
Legal ID requirement may exclude vulnerable populations: Some customers without standard documentation may be unable to access services
No indication of competitive pricing or rate comparisons: No transparency about how MoneyGram's rates compare to other money transfer services in the area
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need convenient access to money transfer and check-cashing services
People without access to traditional banking hours who rely on evening and weekend financial services
Customers sending remittances to family members domestically or internationally
Individuals needing immediate check cashing without maintaining a bank account
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers in the Milwaukee area who need convenient access to money transfer and check-cashing services outside traditional banking hours. The main caveat is that transaction fees are not transparent on the location's web page, and customers must contact the location directly or visit moneygram.com to understand the full cost of services before committing to a transaction.
meta_description: MoneyGram at 4140 W Greenfield Ave, West Milwaukee, WI. Check-cashing, money transfers, and bill payment. Mon-Sat 8AM-8PM.
